title: helichrysum abietinum
intro: Helichrysum abietinum, also known as the Silver Ragwort or Mountain Silver, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oil rich in sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Helichrysum abietinum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice for topical applications. Helichrysum abietinum can be prepared as an essential oil, infused in carrier oils, or used as a tea, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
